events.content: Validated ack strictness against OpenAPI and SDK callers: Validated ack strictness against OpenAPI and SDK callers

raw.question: Validated ack strictness against OpenAPI and SDK callers
raw.chosen: Validated ack strictness against OpenAPI and SDK callers
raw.reasoning: The OpenAPI request body already requires boolean success and TypeScript/Python clients send success on ack, so rejecting missing/non-boolean success matches the current HTTP contract.
